positive: A breathtaking, symmetrical neo-art deco celestial botanical illustration. Central composition featuring a stylized crescent moon intertwined with oversized, bioluminescent floral elements (e.g., stylized lilies, etheric vines). The overall aesthetic should have clean silhouettes and high contrast, utilizing deep midnight blues, vibrant cosmic purples, emerald greens, and hints of glowing gold leaf accents. The style should emulate sophisticated tattoo flash art meeting detailed linework botanical studies, perfect for screen printing on apparel. Focus on elegant, flowing symmetry and dramatic contrast between dark space and glowing floral details. Minimalistic background negative space, vector-like crispness, highly detailed.
